---
title: "Basics of Google Earth Engine"
date: "2026-02-16"
description: "A 5-day virtual workshop for PG students at Centurion University, Bhubaneswar."
image: "../images/Events/geelogo.png"
categories: [Upcoming]
---

**Topic:** Basics of Google Earth Engine  
**Trainer:** Pulakesh Pradhan  
**Mode:** Virtual (Online)  
**Host:** Centurion University, Bhubaneswar  

## Schedule

The workshop will be held from **7:00 PM to 9:30 PM** on the following dates:

- **Monday, Feb 16, 2026**
- **Wednesday, Feb 18, 2026**
- **Thursday, Feb 19, 2026**
- **Saturday, Feb 21, 2026**
- **Sunday, Feb 22, 2026**

This intensive session is designed for PG students to build a strong foundation in Google Earth Engine for geospatial analysis.
